title: Oliveboard is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Oliveboard is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!
